channel.title: Markdown on jtr109's Castle
channel.description: Recent content in Markdown on jtr109's Castle

item.title: Superscript Comment in Markdown
item.description: If we want to comment to an object like we saw in book, we can implement it with Markdown syntax like below. The object[^1] we motioned. [^1]: Comment satisfied to the object above Let’s have a try: The object1 we motioned. Comment satisfied to the object above ↩︎
